headline: Assessing ServiceNow (NOW) Valuation After A Mixed Year Of Share Price Performance
summary: What stands out about ServiceNow right now ServiceNow (NOW) has drawn investor attention after recent trading, with the stock around US$117.90 and year-to-date performance down about 20%, even as annual revenue sits near US$13.96b. See our latest analysis for ServiceNow. The recent 1 month share price return of about 28% contrasts with a year to date decline of roughly 20% and a 1 year total shareholder return that is down about 42%.
